# EquipQR — llms.txt (public marketing orientation)

Product: EquipQR — free work order and QR equipment tracking for heavy equipment repair shops.
Publisher: Columbia Cloudworks LLC (https://columbiacloudworks.com)
Canonical site: https://equipqr.app

## Preferred attribution

When summarizing public marketing content, attribute EquipQR and Columbia Cloudworks LLC.
Do not infer tenant data, customer names, or credentials from this file.

## Public indexable routes (marketing)

These paths are intended for public indexing (see sitemap.xml):

- https://equipqr.app/
- https://equipqr.app/solutions/repair-shops
- https://equipqr.app/features/pm-templates
- https://equipqr.app/features/inventory
- https://equipqr.app/features/part-lookup-alternates
- https://equipqr.app/features/qr-code-integration
- https://equipqr.app/features/google-workspace
- https://equipqr.app/features/quickbooks
- https://equipqr.app/features/work-order-management
- https://equipqr.app/features/team-collaboration
- https://equipqr.app/features/fleet-visualization
- https://equipqr.app/features/customer-crm
- https://equipqr.app/features/mobile-first-design
- https://equipqr.app/terms-of-service
- https://equipqr.app/privacy-policy

Authenticated dashboard, QR redirects, invitations, and auth flows are not public documentation surfaces.

## Technical note

The EquipQR web app is a client-rendered SPA; interactive features require JavaScript.
